inputs.label: Total Credits Attempted
inputs.businessContext: Total number of credits enrolled in the semester

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of credits enrolled in the semester
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der im Semester eingeschriebenen Credits
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de crédits inscrits dans le semestre
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de créditos matriculados en el semestre

inputs.label: Semester GPA
inputs.businessContext: Grade point average for the semester (0.0 - 4.0 scale)

businessContext_i18n.en: Grade point average for the semester (0.0 - 4.0 scale)

inputs.label: Minimum GPA Requirement
inputs.businessContext: Minimum GPA threshold for Dean's List (e.g., 3.5)

businessContext_i18n.en: Minimum GPA threshold for Dean's List (e.g., 3.5)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dekan Listesi için minimum not ortalaması eşiği (ör. 3.5)
businessContext_i18n.de: Mindest-Notendurchschnitt für die Dean's List (z. B. 3,5)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Seuil minimum de moyenne pour le tableau d'honneur (ex. 3,5)
businessContext_i18n.es: Umbral mínimo de GPA para el Cuadro de Honor (ej. 3.5)

inputs.label: Minimum Credits Requirement
inputs.businessContext: Minimum number of earned credits required for Dean's List

businessContext_i18n.en: Minimum number of earned credits required for Dean's List
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dekan Listesi için gereken minimum kazanılan kredi sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Mindestanzahl erworbener Credits für die Dean's List
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre minimum de crédits obtenus requis pour le tableau d'honneur
businessContext_i18n.es: Número mínimo de créditos obtenidos requerido para el Cuadro de Honor

breakdown: meetsGpaRequirement ? 'GPA requirement met' : 'GPA requirement not met'
meetsCreditRequirement ? 'Credit requirement met' : 'Credit requirement not met'
gpaDifference >= 0 ? 'GPA above minimum by ' + gpaDifference.toFixed(2) : 'GPA below minimum by ' + Math.abs(gpaDifference).toFixed(2)
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
